data.name: InvalidEmail
data.value: Please enter a valid email address

data.name: AdminSubtitle
data.value: Manage orders, drinks, and monitor stadium operations

data.name: Drawing_Subtitle
data.value: Draw layers over your stadium picture to create zone overlays, annotations, and custom layouts.

data.name: Drawing_UploadHint
data.value: Upload a stadium picture to start drawing

data.name: Drawing_ReplaceHint
data.value: Upload a different image if needed

data.name: Drawing_UnsavedChangesMsg
data.value: Sector position or size has been modified

data.name: Drawing_RectangleInstructions
data.value: Click and drag to define rectangular sector boundaries

data.name: Drawing_TriangleInstructions
data.value: Click 3 points to create a triangle sector (auto-completes)

data.name: Drawing_RhombusInstructions
data.value: Click 4 points to create a rhombus sector

data.name: Drawing_PolygonInstructions
data.value: Click multiple points to create custom polygon. Double-click to finish (min 3 points)

data.name: Drawing_DefaultInstructions
data.value: Select a shape type from the dropdown above

data.name: StadiumInfo_Subtitle
data.value: Overview of stadium sectors and seating capacity

data.name: StadiumInfo_Empty
data.value: No sectors have been defined yet. Use the Drawing Tool to create sectors.

data.name: StadiumInfo_NoRows
data.value: This sector has no rows configured.

data.name: StadiumInfo_SourcePersistedHint
data.value: Actual database seats from matched sector "{0}"

data.name: StadiumInfo_SourceDerivedHint
data.value: No persisted seat records are linked to this sector — showing the computed layout.

data.name: StadiumInfo_NoPersistedRowSeats
data.value: No persisted seats found for this row.

data.name: StadiumInfo_CountMismatch
data.value: Layout defines {0} seats; {1} persisted in database.

data.name: SectorEdit_UniformModeHint
data.value: All rows will have the same number of seats

data.name: SectorEdit_VariableModeHint
data.value: Define different seat counts for row ranges

data.name: SectorEdit_NoRowPatterns
data.value: No row patterns defined. Click "Add Row Range" to start.

data.name: SectorEdit_SectorPriceHint
data.value: Price per seat in this sector. Leave empty to price by type.

data.name: SectorEdit_SeasonTicketPriceHint
data.value: Season pass price per seat in this sector. Leave empty if not sold as a season ticket.

data.name: SectorEdit_PositionAdjustHint
data.value: Use Select/Move tool on canvas to adjust position

data.name: SectorEdit_ErrorSeatsRange
data.value: Seats per row must be between 1 and 200

data.name: SectorDetail_NoSeats
data.value: No seats found for this sector.

data.name: StructHelp_ConceptSeatsDesc
data.value: Auto-generated based on rows × seats per row

data.name: StructHelp_StandardStadiumDesc
data.value: Four-tribune structure with multiple sectors (20,000 seats)

data.name: StructHelp_ComplexStadiumDesc
data.value: Multi-ring stadium with VIP sections (80,000 seats)

data.name: StructHelp_ReqFieldTribuneCode
data.value: Must be N, S, E, or W

data.name: StructHelp_ReqFieldRings
data.value: At least one ring per tribune

data.name: StructHelp_ReqFieldSectors
data.value: At least one sector per ring

data.name: StructHelp_RuleUniqueTribunes
data.value: Tribune codes must be unique (can't have two "N" tribunes)

data.name: StructHelp_RuleUniqueSectors
data.value: Sector codes must be unique across entire stadium

data.name: StructHelp_RuleSequential
data.value: Ring numbers should be sequential (1, 2, 3, not 1, 3, 5)

data.name: StructHelp_SolutionInvalidCode
data.value: Change to valid code (N, S, E, or W)

data.name: StructHelp_JsonPlaceholder
data.value: Paste your stadium structure JSON here...

data.name: StructHelp_EmptyValidatorState
data.value: Paste JSON and click Validate to see results

data.name: Structure_Subtitle
data.value: Import, export, and review the stadium seating structure

data.name: Structure_QsJsonFile
data.value: JSON file must contain stadium name and tribunes

data.name: Structure_QsTribuneCode
data.value: Tribune codes: N, S, E, W (North, South, East, West)

data.name: Structure_QsSectorNeeds
data.value: Each sector needs rows and seatsPerRow values

data.name: Structure_ImportWarning
data.value: Warning: Import will replace the existing stadium structure!

data.name: Structure_EmptyStateText
data.value: Import a stadium structure to get started.

data.name: Structure_RefreshTooltip
data.value: Refresh stadium layout cache to display updated data immediately

data.name: Structure_ImportSuccessText
data.value: Stadium structure has been imported successfully.

data.name: Structure_ConfirmDeleteText
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the entire stadium structure?

data.name: DataGrid_HeadingSubtitle
data.value: Browse and manage database tables with advanced filtering, sorting, and export capabilities

data.name: DataGrid_GenerateSampleInfo
data.value: Generate up to 1000 sample records with realistic data for testing purposes.

data.name: DataGrid_GeneratedDataInfo1
data.value: Data will be created with realistic sample values

data.name: DataGrid_GeneratedDataInfo2
data.value: All required relationships will be properly linked

data.name: DataGrid_GeneratedDataInfo3
data.value: Generated data is safe for testing and development

data.name: DataGrid_WarningText
data.value: Warning: This action cannot be undone!

data.name: DataGrid_DeleteConfirmationMessage
data.value: You are about to delete ALL {0} records from the {1} table.

data.name: DataGrid_TypeDeleteText
data.value: Type DELETE to confirm this action:

data.name: Logs_Description
data.value: Monitor system activity, errors, and audit events across all applications

data.name: Logs_ShowingFirst50
data.value: Showing first 50 of {0} logs. Use filters to narrow results.

data.name: Logs_NoLogsDescription
data.value: No log entries match your current filters.

data.name: Users_Subtitle
data.value: Manage internal team accounts (Admin and Staff) and their roles

data.name: Users_SearchUsersPlaceholder
data.value: Search by name, username, or email

data.name: Users_StatsUnavailableMessage
data.value: Statistics are not available for this member.

data.name: Users_NoUsersFiltersMessage
data.value: No users match your current filters.

data.name: Drinks_Subtitle
data.value: Manage your beverage catalog, stock levels and availability

data.name: Drinks_StartByAddingMessage
data.value: Start by adding your first drink to the menu.

data.name: Drinks_RestockInvalidQuantity
data.value: Enter a quantity greater than zero

data.name: Tickets_Description
data.value: Browse, validate and manage all stadium tickets

data.name: Tickets_NoTicketsFilters
data.value: No tickets match the current filters.

data.name: Events_Subtitle
data.value: Create, activate and manage stadium events

data.name: Events_EmptyMessage
data.value: Start by creating your first event.

data.name: Events_EditLockedTooltip
data.value: This event has already taken place and can no longer be edited.

data.name: EventStats_Subtitle
data.value: Final sales and ordering figures for this event.

data.name: Events_EndAfterStartValidation
data.value: The end time must be after the start time.

data.name: Events_SalesEndAfterStartValidation
data.value: The sales end time must be after the sales start time.

data.name: Events_SalesWindowHint
data.value: Optional. Leave the start blank to open sales immediately, and the end blank to keep them open while the event is on sale. Tickets can only be sold when the event is On Sale and within this window.

data.name: Events_DrinkSalesEndAfterStartValidation
data.value: The drink ordering end time must be after the start time.

data.name: Events_DrinkWindowHint
data.value: Optional. Leave the start blank to open drink ordering the moment the event goes live, and the end blank to keep it open until the event ends. Drinks can only be ordered while the event is live and within this window.

data.name: Events_CapacityAutoHint
data.value: Set automatically from the stadium layout (total drawn seats).

data.name: Events_SectorPricesHint
data.value: Set a ticket price per sector for this event. Leave a sector blank to use its default price, or tick "Disabled" to close it for this event only.

data.name: Events_SectorDisabledTitle
data.value: Close this sector for this event only (no seats can be sold)

data.name: Events_SectorPricesEmpty
data.value: No stadium sectors have been drawn yet.

data.name: Events_StaffHint
data.value: Select the staff members (bartenders and waiters) who will work this event.

data.name: Events_StaffEmpty
data.value: No staff accounts exist yet. Create bartenders or waiters under Users.

data.name: Events_StaffSectorsEmpty
data.value: No stadium sectors have been drawn yet.

data.name: Orders_Subtitle
data.value: Manage and track all stadium beverage orders

data.name: Statistics_NoData
data.value: No data for the current selection

data.name: Orders_NoOrdersMessage
data.value: No orders match your current filters.

data.name: Analytics_Subtitle
data.value: Comprehensive overview of system performance, sales, and trends

data.name: Analytics_InfoMessage
data.value: Advanced analytics features are currently in development. Use the quick actions below to access available analytics and reports.

data.name: CustAnalytics_Subtitle
data.value: View and analyze customer purchasing behavior and spending patterns

data.name: CustAnalytics_RefineList
data.value: Refine the customer list using the filters above.

data.name: CustAnalytics_NoCustomersFound
data.value: No customers found matching your criteria

data.name: CustAnalytics_AdjustFilters
data.value: Try adjusting or clearing your filters.

data.name: Dash_Subtitle
data.value: Live beverage operations across the stadium

data.name: Dash_OrdersAppearHere
data.value: New orders will appear here as they come in.

data.name: Index_NoEvents
data.value: No events. Create an event to track matchday operations.

data.name: Index_ViewingOtherSeason
data.value: You're viewing an event from {0}, not the current season.

data.name: Overview_NoSectorOverlaysMessage
data.value: Use the Stadium Drawing Tool to create sector overlays

data.name: InfoPanel_ImportStructureMessage
data.value: Import stadium structure to begin analytics

data.name: Overview_EmptyPrompt
data.value: Select an event to view live occupancy and capacity planning.

data.name: Overview_NoSectors
data.value: No stadium sections found. Import a stadium structure first.

data.name: Customers_Subtitle
data.value: View and support registered customer accounts

data.name: Customers_BackfillTooltip
data.value: Provision accounts for existing ticket holders without one

data.name: Customers_EmptyMessage
data.value: No customer accounts match the current filters.

data.name: Seasons_Intro
data.value: Group matches into seasons (e.g. 2026/2027) and sell season tickets against them.

data.name: Seasons_NoneDesc
data.value: Create a season to group matches and enable season tickets.

data.name: Seasons_NoPasses
data.value: No active season passes for this season.

data.name: Seasons_EndAfterStart
data.value: End date must be after the start date.

data.name: Seasons_FormCurrent
data.value: Current season (default for new events & season tickets)

data.name: Seasons_FinishedNotCurrent
data.value: This season has already finished, so it can't be set as the current season.

data.name: Seasons_ValidationNameEnd
data.value: A season needs a name and an end date after the start.

data.name: Seasons_DeleteConfirm
data.value: Delete season '{0}'? Linked events will be unlinked.

data.name: App_NothingAtAddress
data.value: Sorry, there's nothing at this address.

data.name: FetchData_Description
data.value: This component demonstrates fetching data from a service.

data.name: TestError_Subtitle
data.value: Test different error scenarios to verify error notifications are working

data.name: TestError_TestApiConnection
data.value: Test API Connection (Will likely fail if API not running)

data.name: TestError_TestDrinksFetch
data.value: Test Drinks Fetch (Uses new error handling)

data.name: TestError_TestOrdersFetch
data.value: Test Orders Fetch (Uses new error handling)

data.name: TestError_ResultsNote
data.value: Watch the top-right corner of the screen for toast notifications!

data.name: Wallets_Intro
data.value: Inspect, freeze, adjust and refund fan wallet balances.

data.name: Wallets_NoneDesc
data.value: No fan has opened a wallet yet.

data.name: Venue_Subtitle
data.value: Stadium identity and the clubs resident here.

data.name: Venue_Error
data.value: Could not load the venue profile.

data.name: Venue_CapacityDerived
data.value: Calculated automatically from the stadium structure (total seats). Not editable.

data.name: Settings_TicketSalesEnabled
data.value: Sell tickets to customers in this app

data.name: Settings_TicketSalesEnabledHint
data.value: When off, the customer app hides its buy flow and the API rejects new purchases. Tickets then enter the system only through the external ticketing integration.

data.name: Settings_TicketSalesOn
data.value: Ticket sales are ON — customers can buy tickets in the app.

data.name: Settings_TicketSalesOff
data.value: Ticket sales are OFF — tickets only come from the external system.

data.name: Settings_EmailSubtitle
data.value: Configure the outgoing mail server used for account activation links and notification emails.

data.name: Settings_EmailEnabledHint
data.value: When off, emails are written to the application log instead of being delivered.

data.name: Settings_EmailPasswordStoredHint
data.value: A password is saved. Leave blank to keep it, or enter a new one to replace it.

data.name: Settings_EmailPasswordHint
data.value: Leave blank if your mail server requires no authentication.

data.name: Settings_EmailTestHint
data.value: Send a test message to confirm the SMTP configuration works. Uses the values above; if the password field is blank the saved password is used.

data.name: Settings_EmailTemplatesSubtitle
data.value: Edit the subject and content of the emails the system sends to customers.

data.name: EmailTemplates_Subtitle
data.value: Customize the subject and content of the transactional emails the system sends.

data.name: EmailTemplates_PlaceholdersHint
data.value: Insert these tokens in the subject or body; they are replaced with real values when the email is sent.

data.name: EmailTemplates_TextBodyHint
data.value: Optional. Shown by email clients that don't render HTML.

data.name: EmailTemplates_PreviewSampleHint
data.value: Placeholders are filled with sample values for this preview.

data.name: Settings_PurgeHint
data.value: Permanently removes every ticket, order, event, season, wallet transaction and wallet balance. Users, drinks, stadium structure and venue branding are kept. This cannot be undone.

data.name: Settings_PurgeConfirmBody
data.value: This permanently deletes ALL tickets, orders, events, seasons, wallet transactions and wallet balances. This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Settings_PurgeSuccess
data.value: All transactional data deleted ({0} rows removed).

data.name: Settings_PurgeFailed
data.value: Failed to delete data. No changes were made.

data.name: Settings_BackupSubtitle
data.value: Save a snapshot of the database to a file, or restore selected tables from a backup file.

data.name: Settings_BackupExportHint
data.value: Pick the tables to include, then download a single JSON backup file. The file may contain sensitive data (password hashes, tokens, wallet balances) — store it securely.

data.name: Settings_RestoreWarning
data.value: Restoring REPLACES all rows in each selected table with the contents of the backup file. This cannot be undone. For a consistent result, restore related tables together.

data.name: Settings_RestoreNoKnownTables
data.value: This file contains no tables this application recognises.

data.name: Settings_RestoreUnknownTables
data.value: Ignored unknown tables in the file: {0}

data.name: Settings_RestoreInvalidFile
data.value: That file is not a valid Stadium backup.

data.name: Settings_RestoreConfirmBody
data.value: This will delete and replace all rows in the following {0} table(s) with the backup contents. This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Settings_RestoreSuccess
data.value: Restore complete — {0} rows inserted across {1} table(s).

data.name: Settings_RestoreFailed
data.value: Restore failed and was rolled back: {0}

data.name: Tickets_DetailNoOrders
data.value: No drink orders placed on this ticket.

data.name: Tickets_DetailDownloadFailed
data.value: Could not generate the PDF. Please try again.
